translatedText: March 4, 1933
Inaugurated as the 32nd President of the United States.
March 5, 1933
Declared a four-day 'bank holiday'.
March 9, 1933
The Emergency Banking Act was passed.
March 22, 1933
Signed the Cullen-Harrison Act, effectively ending Prohibition.
The National Industrial Recovery Act (NIRA) was implemented.
Reformed financial regulation through the Glass-Steagall Act.
Established the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).
Established the Federal Communications Commission (FCC).
May 1935
The Supreme Court declared the National Industrial Recovery Act unconstitutional.
The Social Security Act was passed.
Established the Works Progress Administration (WPA).

sourceText: 미국 대통령 선거에서 압승을 거두며 재선
translatedText: Won re-election in a landslide victory in the US presidential election.

sourceText: 사법 절차 개혁 법안 통과 실패
translatedText: Failed to pass the Judicial Procedures Reform Bill.
The Housing Act was passed.
Founded the National Foundation for Infantile Paralysis.
The Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA) was passed.
Passed the Reorganization Act and established the Executive Office of the President.
September 1939

sourceText: 독일의 폴란드 침공으로 제2차 세계 대전 발발
translatedText: World War II broke out with Germany's invasion of Poland.

sourceText: 미국 대통령 선거에서 당선되며 세 번 이상 재임한 유일한 대통령이 됨
translatedText: Won the US presidential election, becoming the only president to serve more than two terms.
January 1941
Delivered the 'Four Freedoms' speech.
Obtained congressional approval for the Lend-Lease Act.
December 7, 1941

sourceText: 일본의 진주만 공습 이후 일본으로부터 선전포고 받음
translatedText: Received a declaration of war from Japan following the attack on Pearl Harbor.
December 11, 1941
Germany and Italy declared war on the United States.
April 12, 1945
Passed away.
Longest-Serving US President

sourceText: 미국 역사상 가장 오랫동안 재임하고 3번 이상의 임기를 수행한 유일한 대통령입니다.
translatedText: The only president in US history to serve more than two terms and have the longest tenure.
Implementation of the New Deal

sourceText: 대공황 극복을 위해 뉴딜 정책을 시행하여 실업자와 농부들에게 구제를 제공하고 경제 회복을 추구했습니다.
translatedText: Implemented the New Deal to overcome the Great Depression, providing relief to the unemployed and farmers while seeking economic recovery.

sourceText: 정치 개편 및 현대 자유주의 개척
translatedText: Political Realignment and Pioneering Modern Liberalism

sourceText: '뉴딜 연합'을 구축하여 미국의 정치를 제5차 정당제로 개편하고 현대 자유주의를 개척했습니다.
translatedText: Built the 'New Deal Coalition', realigning American politics into the Fifth Party System and pioneering modern liberalism.
Financial and Labor Reforms

sourceText: 증권거래위원회, 예금보험공사 설립, 전국노동관계법 제정 등 금융, 통신, 노동 관련 주요 규제 개혁을 도입했습니다.
translatedText: Introduced major regulatory reforms regarding finance, communications, and labor, including the establishment of the SEC and FDIC, and the enactment of the National Labor Relations Act.
Repeal of Prohibition

sourceText: 컬렌-해리슨 법에 서명하여 금주법 시대를 끝냈습니다.
translatedText: Signed the Cullen-Harrison Act, effectively ending the era of Prohibition.
Leadership during World War II

sourceText: 추축국에 대항하는 연합국을 이끌기 위해 다른 국가 지도자들과 긴밀히 협력하고 미국의 경제 동원을 감독했습니다.
translatedText: Worked closely with other national leaders to lead the Allies against the Axis powers, overseeing the economic mobilization of the US.
Initiation of Nuclear Weapons Development
Initiated the development of the world's first nuclear weapons.
Laying the Groundwork for the United Nations

sourceText: 다른 연합국 지도자들과 협력하여 국제 연합과 기타 전후 기관의 토대를 마련했습니다.
translatedText: Collaborated with other Allied leaders to lay the groundwork for the United Nations and other post-war institutions.
Promotion of the Good Neighbor Policy

sourceText: 라틴아메리카 국가들의 문제에 일방적으로 개입할 권리를 포기하는 선린 정책을 추진했습니다.
translatedText: Promoted the Good Neighbor policy, renouncing the right to unilaterally intervene in the affairs of Latin American countries.
Establishment of the Social Security System

sourceText: 사회보장법을 통해 노인, 빈곤층, 장애인들에게 경제적 보장을 약속하는 사회 보장 제도를 법적으로 확립했습니다.
translatedText: Legally established the Social Security system through the Social Security Act, promising economic security for the elderly, the poor, and the disabled.
Improvement of Labor Standards

sourceText: 공정근로기준법(FLSA)을 통과시켜 아동 노동을 불법화하고 연방 최저 임금을 설정했습니다.
translatedText: Passed the Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA), outlawing child labor and establishing a federal minimum wage.
Establishment of the Executive Office of the President

sourceText: 1939년 재조직법을 통해 연방 행정부의 중추 역할을 하는 대통령실을 설립했습니다.
translatedText: Established the Executive Office of the President, which serves as the nerve center of the federal executive branch, through the Reorganization Act of 1939.
Environmental Conservation Efforts

sourceText: 국립공원, 국립산림의 확장 및 자금 지원을 장려하고 민간 보존단을 통해 환경 보전 노력을 기울였습니다.
translatedText: Encouraged the expansion and funding of national parks and forests, and made environmental conservation efforts through the Civilian Conservation Corps (CCC).

sourceText: 프랭클린 D. 루스벨트는 몇 대 대통령이었습니까?
translatedText: Which president was Franklin D. Roosevelt?
He served as the 32nd President of the United States.

sourceText: 프랭클린 D. 루스벨트의 주요 업적은 무엇입니까?
translatedText: What are Franklin D. Roosevelt's major achievements?

sourceText: 대공황 극복을 위한 뉴딜 정책을 시행하고 제2차 세계 대전에서 연합국을 이끌었습니다.
translatedText: He implemented the New Deal to overcome the Great Depression and led the Allies during World War II.

sourceText: 프랭클린 D. 루스벨트는 몇 번 대통령에 당선되었습니까?
translatedText: How many times was Franklin D. Roosevelt elected president?

sourceText: 그는 미국 역사상 유일하게 3번 이상, 총 4번 대통령에 당선되었습니다.
translatedText: He is the only president in US history to be elected more than twice, winning a total of four presidential elections.

sourceText: 프랭클린 D. 루스벨트는 어떤 질병을 앓았습니까?
translatedText: What illness did Franklin D. Roosevelt suffer from?
He was diagnosed with polio in 1921, which paralyzed his lower body.
Who was Franklin D. Roosevelt's wife?
His wife was Eleanor Roosevelt.
When did Franklin D. Roosevelt die?
He passed away on April 12, 1945.
April 26, 121
Marcus Aurelius Antoninus was born in Rome.
April 132

sourceText: 디오그네투스의 명령에 따라 철학자의 의복을 입고 삶의 방식을 받아들임.
translatedText: Under the instruction of Diognetus, he took up the dress and lifestyle of a philosopher.
January 24, 138

sourceText: 하드리아누스의 후계자 안토니누스 피우스가 마르쿠스를 양자로 입양.
translatedText: Marcus was adopted by Antoninus Pius, the successor to Hadrian.

sourceText: 하드리아누스 사망 후 안토니누스 피우스가 황제로 즉위.
translatedText: Following the death of Hadrian, Antoninus Pius ascended to the throne as emperor.
Served as quaestor under Antoninus Pius.

sourceText: 안토니누스 피우스를 동료 집정관으로 하여 집정관이 됨.
translatedText: Became consul, with Antoninus Pius as his colleague.
January 1, 145
Became consul for the second time.
April 145
Married Faustina, the daughter of Antoninus Pius.
November 30, 147
First daughter, Domitia Faustina, was born.
December 1, 147

sourceText: 안토니누스 피우스가 마르쿠스에게 트리부누스 권한과 임페리움을 내려줌.
translatedText: Antoninus Pius conferred tribunician power and imperium upon Marcus.

sourceText: 파우스티나가 쌍둥이 형제 티투스 아우렐리우스 안토니누스와 티베리우스 아일리우스 아우렐리우스 출산 (이들은 오래 살지 못함).
translatedText: Faustina gave birth to twin boys, Titus Aurelius Antoninus and Tiberius Aelius Aurelius (neither lived long).
March 7, 150

sourceText: 딸 안니아 아우렐리아 갈레리아 루킬라 출생.
translatedText: Daughter Annia Aurelia Galeria Lucilla was born.
Daughter Domitia Faustina presumed dead.

sourceText: 아들 티베리우스 아일리우스 안토니누스 출생 (오래 살지 못함).
translatedText: Son Tiberius Aelius Antoninus was born (did not live long).
Between 155 and 161
Marcus's mother, Domitia Lucilla, died.
Around March 28, 158

sourceText: 자식의 죽음을 또 맏이함 (이름 알려져 있지 않음).
translatedText: Faced the death of another child (name unknown).
Faustina gave birth to daughters Fadilla and Cornificia.

sourceText: 안토니누스 피우스 사망 후, 마르쿠스와 루키우스 베루스가 공동 황제로 즉위.
translatedText: After the death of Antoninus Pius, Marcus and Lucius Verus ascended to the throne as co-emperors.

sourceText: 로마 화폐 데나리우스의 은 순도를 83.5%에서 79%로 떨어트림.
translatedText: Decreased the silver purity of the Roman denarius from 83.5% to 79%.
Late summer or early autumn 161

sourceText: 파르티아의 볼로가세스 4세가 대아르메니아 왕국에 진입하여 왕을 몰아내고 파코루스를 옹립.
translatedText: Vologases IV of Parthia entered the Kingdom of Greater Armenia, ousted the king, and installed Pacorus.
Outbreak of the Parthian War.
Summer 162

sourceText: 루키우스가 파르티아 전쟁을 몸소 다루기 위해 전장으로 떠남.
translatedText: Lucius left for the front to personally oversee the Parthian War.
The Armenian capital Artaxata was captured.
Late 163
Lucius took the title 'Armeniacus'.

sourceText: 새로운 아르메니아 수도 카이네 폴리스가 아르탁사타를 대신함.
translatedText: A new Armenian capital, Kaine Polis, replaced Artaxata.

sourceText: 로마군이 메소포타미아로 움직여 에데사를 점령하고 만누스 왕을 다시 옹립. 니시비스 함락.
translatedText: Roman forces moved into Mesopotamia, capturing Edessa and restoring King Mannus. Nisibis also fell.
Late 165

sourceText: 카시우스의 군대가 셀레우키아와 크테시폰에 도달, 크테시폰 점령 및 왕궁 불태움, 셀레우키아 약탈.
translatedText: Cassius's forces reached Seleucia and Ctesiphon, captured Ctesiphon, burned the royal palace, and sacked Seleucia.

sourceText: 안토니누스 역병이 메소포타미아에서 발생하여 로마에 퍼짐.
translatedText: The Antonine Plague broke out in Mesopotamia and spread to Rome.

sourceText: 카시우스의 군대가 티그리스강을 건너 메디아로 향하여 전장으로 복귀. 루키우스가 '메디쿠스' 칭호를 차지.
translatedText: Cassius's army crossed the Tigris into Media before returning from the campaign. Lucius took the title 'Medicus'.
October 12, 166

sourceText: 마르쿠스가 자신의 쌍둥이 아들 안니우스와 콤모두스를 후계자로 선포.
translatedText: Marcus proclaimed his twin sons, Annius and Commodus, as heirs.
Outbreak of the Marcomannic Wars (wars with Germanic tribes).

sourceText: 데나리우스의 은 순도를 79%에서 82%로 높여 가치를 재조정.
translatedText: Revalued the denarius by increasing its silver purity from 79% to 82%.
